acceptance_rule: candidate must tie or beat deck_607 on same real-opponent gate
candidate must not regress the Winota matchup
candidate must preserve or improve miracle/topdeck game frequency
candidate must not cut pressure absorption unless replacing same function

tested.learning: High structural score does not beat deck_607 if the shell overfills engine/ramp and loses pressure response.

tested.swap_or_scope: +Aetherflux Reservoir, +Birgi, +Enlightened Tutor, +Gamble, +Past in Flames, +Storm-Kiln Artist; six cuts from 607
tested.learning: Importing the v7 package as a bundle damages deck_607 execution; does not isolate Birgi.
Molecule Man and The Scarlet Witch are protected plan pieces, not easy cuts.
Penance is coherent, but cutting pressure absorption hurt the pressure matchup.
Lower-curve spell payoff did not convert better than the original high-impact finisher.

untested_queue.swap_or_scope: +Birgi, God of Storytelling // Harnfel, Horn of Bounty; -Bender's Waterskin
untested_queue.why: Same-function mana/engine sidegrade; Birgi has active battle rule and has not been isolated from failed v7 bundles.
untested_queue.risk: Creature engine may be easier to remove than artifact mana; must not regress Winota.

untested_queue.why: Cheap protection/cantrip style effect may protect conversion window without cutting pressure package.
untested_queue.risk: Needs careful same-function cut; do not cut board wipe or miracle payoff.

untested_queue.why: Runtime has verified topdeck free-cast rule; aligns with topdeck/miracle theme.
untested_queue.risk: Five-mana creature may be too slow and could reduce current pressure density.

untested_queue.why: Verified spell-damage payoff, but Longshot already failed a similar lane.
untested_queue.risk: Likely lower priority because similar payoff lane underperformed.

untested_queue.why: May improve combat pressure matchup if replacing same function only.
untested_queue.risk: Can reduce spell density if cut is not same-function.
